channel.title: Deep Dives on CEZ Consulting
channel.description: Recent content in Deep Dives on CEZ Consulting

item.title: Locally Rational, Globally Expensive
item.description: Every function adopts AI for the same class of problem, under a different name, bought and governed separately. Each decision is locally rational. The aggregate is structural debt nobody chose.

item.title: Narrative vs Structure
item.description: Faced with a structural problem, organisations change the narrative, not the structure. AI is the first technology fast enough to tell the two apart.

item.title: The Fallacy of ROI
item.description: The ROI question is not a measurement problem. It is a comprehension problem dressed as a financial one, and it works as a brake that defers commitment without anyone having to say no.

item.title: The Production Gap
item.description: Enterprise AI rarely fails on technical merit. It stalls at the boundary between experiment and operation, where an industrial-era operating model meets a system it was never designed to govern. The gap is structural, and it is the gap that decides the return.
